Handmade ceramics for bright everyday rituals.

Small-batch vessels, cups, tiles, and sculptural pieces shaped by hand and finished with Abigail's playful glaze language.

Pottery Experiences

Classes stay available, but the shop remains the main story.

Private Kids Pottery Parties

Hi, I'm Abigail

Clay is where patience, play, and useful objects meet. Abigail's pieces are made in small batches, with organic handles, glossy glaze details, and forms that feel personal from the first use.

Shop updates, commissions, and class availability can all live here as the brand grows.

Stay in the loop

Get first notice of new pieces, market dates, and class openings.

Let's Connect

abigailsceramics@yahoo.com832-857-9257

Based in Texas
